$comment: Single source of truth for the habitat rule pack. H2 wrapped existing rules; later slices add owning-tool gates such as H3 import-boundaries and H4 format hygiene. Consumed by src/rules/architecture.ts (CLI, typed) and src/plugin.ts (workspace target inference). Field semantics: docs/projects/habitat-harness/ + openspec/changes/habitat-harness-scaffold/design.md. ownerProject = the workspace project whose habitat:check target runs this rule. lane: enforced rules fail `habitat check`; advisory rules report only (matching pre-harness enforcement reality). detect runs from the repo root unless cwd is set.
